articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.title: Alexa+ gets a new ‘adults only’ personality option that curses but won’t do NSFW content - TechCrunch
articles.description: The new Sassy style can curse and roast you, but the fun ends there.
articles.content: Amazon’s AI assistant Alexa+ is getting another new personality. On Thursday, the company announced it’s expanding its lineup of personality styles for users to choose from to include a “Sassy” optio… [+1898 chars]
